source: CIS ALIBABA CLOUD CONTAINER SERVICE FOR KUBERNETES (ACK) BENCHMARK V1.0.0
title: Minimize user access to ACR

input_row.source: CIS ALIBABA CLOUD CONTAINER SERVICE FOR KUBERNETES (ACK) BENCHMARK V1.0.0
input_row.title: Minimize user access to ACR
input_row.description: Restrict	user	access	to	ACR,	limiting	interaction	with	build	images	to	only	authorized personnel	and	service	accounts.
input_row.rationale: Weak	access	control	to	ACR	may	allow	malicious	users	to	replace	built	images	with vulnerable	containers. Impact: Care	should	be	taken	not	to	remove	access	to	ACR	for	accounts	that	require	this	for	their operation.
input_row.audit: Follow	the	ACR	document	to	check	network	access	control: https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/142179.htm Follow	the	ACR	document	to	check	Resource	Access	Management	(RAM)	policies	which	are related	with	ACR: https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/144229.htm
input_row.remediation: Follow	the	ACR	document	to	setup	network	access	control: https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/142179.htm Follow	the	ACR	document	to	setup	Resource	Access	Management	(RAM)	policies	for	ACR: https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/144229.htm Default	Value: By	default,	ACR	is	disabled	and	access	controls	are	set	during	initialisation. References: 1. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/67992.htm 2. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/142179.htm 3. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/142247.htm 251	|	P a g e 4. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/144229.htm CIS	Controls: Version	7 14.6	Protect	Information	through	Access	Control	Lists Protect	all	information	stored	on	systems	with	file	system,	network	share,	claims, application,	or	database	specific	access	control	lists.	These	controls	will	enforce	the principle	that	only	authorized	individuals	should	have	access	to	the	information	based	on their	need	to	access	the	information	as	a	part	of	their	responsibilities. 252	|	P a g e
input_row.impact: Care	should	be	taken	not	to	remove	access	to	ACR	for	accounts	that	require	this	for	their operation.
input_row.references: 1. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/67992.htm 2. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/142179.htm 3. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/142247.htm 251	|	P a g e 4. https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/doc-detail/144229.htm CIS	Controls: Version	7 14.6	Protect	Information	through	Access	Control	Lists Protect	all	information	stored	on	systems	with	file	system,	network	share,	claims, application,	or	database	specific	access	control	lists.	These	controls	will	enforce	the principle	that	only	authorized	individuals	should	have	access	to	the	information	based	on their	need	to	access	the	information	as	a	part	of	their	responsibilities. 252	|	P a g e

step1_initial_assessment:
Based on analyzing all fields for the control "Minimize user access to ACR" from the CIS Alibaba Cloud Container Service for Kubernetes (ACK) Benchmark, here is the audit approach determination:

**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**APPROACH DECISION:**

- The control's primary focus is on limiting access to Alibaba Cloud Container Registry (ACR) through Resource Access Management (RAM) policies and network access control.
- Alibaba Cloud provides APIs and CLI commands to manage and describe RAM policies and network settings associated with ACR.
- The audit field refers to checking network access control and RAM policies, both of which are standard Alibaba Cloud service properties that can be verified through APIs or CLI.
- The Aliyun CLI and Alibaba Cloud CLI can be used to obtain and evaluate existing RAM policies and network settings.
- The rationale and references emphasize configuring access controls and network restrictions using documented procedures, which align with automated checks.

Given the above considerations and the availability of necessary APIs and CLI commands to audit these configurations, this control should be audited through an automated approach.

**PROGRAM NAME:** ali_acr_access_control_audit

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**

1. **API Calls & CLI Commands:**
   - Use `aliyun ram ListPolicies` to list RAM policies and check for those associated with ACR.
   - Use `aliyun ecs DescribeSecurityGroups` and `aliyun ecs DescribeSecurityGroupAttribute` to review network access controls for ACR endpoints.

2. **Resources to Enumerate:**
   - Enumerate all RAM policies in the account to ensure there are no overly permissive policies attached to ACR resources.
   - Enumerate security groups and network ACLs associated with ACR for verifying proper restrictions.

3. **Configuration Properties/Settings to Validate:**
   - Ensure that RAM policies attached to ACR resources enforce least privilege principles.
   - Verify network rules in security groups/ACLs restrict access to ACR to authorized sources.

4. **Pass/Fail Criteria:**
   - PASS: RAM policies follow the principle of least privilege with no overly broad permissions, and security groups properly restrict ACR access.
   - FAIL: Any RAM policy with excessive permissions related to ACR, or any security group allowing unrestricted access to ACR.

By implementing this automated audit program, detailed checks on access restrictions set on ACR can be efficiently and reliably conducted.
